title: trifolium angustifolium subsp. intermedium
intro: Trifolium angustifolium subsp. intermedium is a subspecies of the narrow-leaved white clover plant, which is a perennial legume native to the Northern Hemisphere. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Trifolium angustifolium subsp. intermedium include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
